name: Ikonic Professional Curling Tong CT-19

description: Professional Ceramic Barrel with Extra Long 8" Barrel. Tames Frizz And Static, Giving You Smoother, Shinier Curls With A Polished Finish. Ensures Complete Coverage For Maximum Hair Length.

description: Professional Heat Up Curling Tong with Ceramic Shine-Infused Barrel and Heat Ready Indicator System for perfect curls every time.

description: HNK Hot Wand 10mm for perfect Curls & Waves. Features Cool Settings, Swivel cord and Auto Shut Off for safe styling. 2.5m cord length.

name: HNK Twist Curling Tong
description: HNK 360° Rotating Rosegold Twist Curling Tong with Fast Heat Up, Auto Barrel Surface and Auto Off feature for effortless curls.

name: Auburn Ikonic Hair Straightener
description: Auburn IKONIC Hair Straightener delivers sleek, salon-quality styling at home with adjustable heat settings and smooth glide plates. Fast heating and effortless use leaves your hair silky, shiny, and frizz-free in minutes.

name: Ikonic Professional Slim Titanium Crimper
description: Ikonic Professional Slim Titanium Crimper with Nano Titanium Technology. Adjustable temperature range from 80°C to 230°C. Emits Far-Infrared Heat that is gentle on hair leaving it shiny and glossy.

name: Ikonic S3+ Ceramic Hair Iron
description: Ikonic Professional S3+ Ceramic Hair Iron with LED Temperature Display and 1" Slim Ceramic Floating Plates. Adjustable range from 110°C to 235°C for precise heat control and smooth even styling.

name: Ikonic Pro Straight Hair Iron
description: Ikonic Professional Pro Straight Hair Iron ideal for chemical treatments. Floating and extra-long plates ensure perfect alignment and even heat dispersion for efficient styling.

name: V&G V22 Professional Hair Crimper
description: V&G V22 Hair Crimper delivers bold, defined texture with smooth ceramic crimp plates that ensure even heat and frizz-free results. Fast styling and long-lasting volume with professional salon-finish look.

name: V&G V22 Professional Hair Straightener
description: V&G V22 Professional Hair Straightener combines precision heat technology with sleek ceramic plates to deliver ultra-smooth, frizz-free results in a single glide. Polished salon-quality finish that lasts.

name: VGR V-509 Professional Hair Straightener
description: VGR V-509 Professional Hair Straightener with Uniform Heat Technology. 28mm wide plates, LED display, 360° swivel power cord. Temperature range 300°F to max 450°F for perfect styling.

name: O3+ Diamond Age-Targeting Facial Kit
description: Improved skin radiance & pH balance luminous facial kit. Enriched with diamond dust to refresh and revitalize the skin. Synergizes into the skin's nano cellular matrix to rid the impurities and reveal younger, smoother, and brighter looking skin.

name: O3+ Whitening Facial Kit
description: Professional 6-in-1 advanced whitening facial kit that brightens and unifies skin tone. Makes skin visibly youthful and radiant. Includes Cleanser, Scrub, Nourishing Cream, Hydrating Gel, Lacto Shine Cream, and D-Tan Pack.

description: Professional facial with skin advance formula featuring active fruits infusion. A unique blend of Grapes & Raspberry extracts that helps in removal of oily cynical layer from skin surface. Nourishes skin and makes it soft & supple.
